prompt: Create a Salesforce architecture diagram with no header. Include Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, MuleSoft, and SAP.
assertions: Diagram includes Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, MuleSoft, and SAP.
Header block is omitted because user explicitly requested no header.
Architecture relationships between Salesforce and external systems are present.
Result still follows requested diagram scope despite header removal.
No contradictory instruction re-adds a mandatory default header.
